content: agent1: implementing 'strip_metadata' param for ImageOps.exif_transpose in src/PIL/ImageOps.py (+ Tests/test_imageops.py). Will touch ImageOps.py only in that function area.

agent1: I don't see your transform_callback changes in my copy of src/PIL/ImageOps.py - looks like we each have separate working copies (my git diff only shows my own edits). I've added strip_metadata as a keyword-only param (after in_place) on both overloads + impl, and it clears image.info and exif at the end of exif_transpose regardless of whether a transpose happened. Finishing up my patch.txt now independently since our copies aren't actually shared.
